field_values.action_summary: Dorothy retrieves her shoe and rushes through the castle to free the Lion and her friends.
field_values.camera_intent: Tracking shots following Dorothy as she runs; Medium shots of reunions; Wide shot of group reunited
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Silver Shoe must be visible on Dorothy's foot/hand after retrieval

field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH012_SC006

## Production Intent
Dorothy retrieves her silver shoe and navigates the castle interior to locate and liberate her companions. The sequence must transition from a moment of recovery to high-stakes movement through the prison/courtyard areas.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- cowardly_lion (brief)
- Scarecrow (brief)
- tin_woodman (brief)

## Required Environments
- wicked_witch_castle_courtyard (including retrieval and prison subzones)

## Continuity Constraints
- Silver Shoe must be visible on Dorothy's foot/hand after retrieval
- Physical condition of the Scarecrow and Tin Woodman
- Dorothy's white clothing state

## Beat List
- BT001: Dorothy retrieves the Silver Shoe
- BT002: Dorothy rushes through the castle
- BT003: The group reunites
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
